requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容辐射发射——UNBS / IEC标准
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容輻射發射——UNBS / IEC標準

summary.en: Uganda National Bureau of Standards (UNBS) adopts IEC and ISO standards as Uganda Standards (US). EMC emissions requirements for wireless and IoT devices are based on IEC 55022 / CISPR 22 (replaced by CISPR 32 for multimedia equipment) and CISPR 11 for ISM equipment, adopted as US standards. Test reports against these IEC/CISPR-aligned standards are required to support UCC type approval and UNBS market surveillance. CE Declaration of Conformity covering ETSI EN 55032 is not recognised as satisfying UNBS requirements directly.
summary.zh: 乌干达国家标准局（UNBS）采用IEC和ISO标准作为乌干达标准（US）。无线及物联网设备的电磁兼容辐射发射要求基于IEC 55022 / CISPR 22（多媒体设备已由CISPR 32替代）和工科医设备的CISPR 11，均已被采纳为US标准。支持UCC型式批准和UNBS市场监督须提交符合上述IEC/CISPR标准的测试报告。涵盖ETSI EN 55032的CE符合性声明不被UNBS直接认可。
summary.zht: 烏干達國家標準局（UNBS）採用IEC和ISO標準作為烏干達標準（US）。無線及物聯網裝置的電磁相容輻射發射要求基於IEC 55022 / CISPR 22（多媒體設備已由CISPR 32替代）和工科醫設備的CISPR 11，均已被採納為US標準。支持UCC型式批准和UNBS市場監督須提交符合上述IEC/CISPR標準的測試報告。涵蓋ETSI EN 55032的CE符合性聲明不被UNBS直接認可。

standards_or_laws: CISPR 32:2015 (Multimedia equipment — Emission requirements; replaces CISPR 22)
Uganda Standards (US) — IEC/CISPR adoptions via UNBS

summary.en: China EMC emissions compliance relies on GB 9254 (Information technology equipment — Radio disturbance characteristics) and GB 4343.1 (Household appliances / ISM equipment), which align with CISPR 22 and CISPR 11 respectively. GB 9254 / GB 4343.1 test reports are generated under the CCC or self-declaration regime. These GB-standard reports may provide useful supporting evidence for UNBS testing but do not substitute for IEC/CISPR-cited test reports required by UCC/UNBS.
summary.zh: 中国电磁兼容辐射发射合规依据GB 9254（信息技术设备——无线电骚扰特性）和GB 4343.1（家用电器/工科医设备），分别与CISPR 22和CISPR 11对应。GB 9254 / GB 4343.1测试报告通过CCC或自我声明体系产生。这些GB标准报告可作为UNBS测试的参考佐证，但不能替代UCC/UNBS所要求的引用IEC/CISPR标准的测试报告。
summary.zht: 中國電磁相容輻射發射合規依據GB 9254（信息技術設備——無線電騷擾特性）和GB 4343.1（家用電器/工科醫設備），分別與CISPR 22和CISPR 11對應。GB 9254 / GB 4343.1測試報告通過CCC或自我聲明體系產生。這些GB標準報告可作為UNBS測試的參考佐證，但不能替代UCC/UNBS所要求的引用IEC/CISPR標準的測試報告。

standards_or_laws: GB 9254-2008 (Information technology equipment — Radio disturbance characteristics; aligned with CISPR 22)
GB 4343.1-2018 (Household appliances / ISM equipment; aligned with CISPR 11)
CCC mandatory certification for applicable in-scope products

gap.en: China GB 9254 and GB 4343.1 test reports are CISPR-aligned but issued under the Chinese national standards framework. UNBS requires IEC/CISPR-cited test reports from an accredited laboratory. GB reports may assist in testing but a fresh IEC/CISPR-cited test report (or a CNAS/ILAC-accredited lab report referencing the CISPR standard directly) is needed to support UCC type approval and UNBS market entry.
gap.zh: 中国GB 9254和GB 4343.1测试报告与CISPR标准对应，但在中国国家标准框架下签发。UNBS要求引用IEC/CISPR标准的认可实验室测试报告。GB报告可辅助测试准备，但仍需提供直接引用CISPR标准的IEC/CISPR测试报告（或CNAS/ILAC认可实验室报告）以支持UCC型式批准和UNBS市场准入。
gap.zht: 中國GB 9254和GB 4343.1測試報告與CISPR標準對應，但在中國國家標準框架下簽發。UNBS要求引用IEC/CISPR標準的認可實驗室測試報告。GB報告可輔助測試準備，但仍需提供直接引用CISPR標準的IEC/CISPR測試報告（或CNAS/ILAC認可實驗室報告）以支持UCC型式批准和UNBS市場准入。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Uganda (UNBS) adopts IEC/CISPR-aligned standards for EMC emissions. China GB 9254 / GB 4343.1 reports are structurally similar but issued under Chinese national standards; IEC/CISPR-cited test reports from an accredited laboratory are needed to support UCC type approval and UNBS market surveillance compliance.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 乌干达（UNBS）采用与IEC/CISPR一致的电磁兼容辐射发射标准。中国GB 9254 / GB 4343.1报告结构相似，但在中国国家标准框架下签发；仍需提供引用IEC/CISPR标准的认可实验室测试报告，以支持UCC型式批准和UNBS市场监督合规。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 烏干達（UNBS）採用與IEC/CISPR一致的電磁相容輻射發射標準。中國GB 9254 / GB 4343.1報告結構相似，但在中國國家標準框架下簽發；仍需提供引用IEC/CISPR標準的認可實驗室測試報告，以支持UCC型式批准和UNBS市場監督合規。

requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容抗扰度——UNBS / IEC标准
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容抗擾度——UNBS / IEC標準

summary.en: UNBS adopts IEC 61000-series immunity standards as Uganda Standards (US). Immunity requirements for information technology and wireless equipment are based on IEC 61000-4-x (ESD, radiated immunity, EFT/burst, surge, conducted disturbances) as adopted under IEC 61000-6-1 (generic residential immunity) and IEC 61000-6-2 (generic industrial immunity) or product-specific standards such as IEC 62368-1 (which includes immunity requirements for audio/video and IT equipment). Test evidence to these IEC standards supports UCC type approval dossiers and UNBS post-market surveillance.
summary.zh: UNBS将IEC 61000系列抗扰度标准作为乌干达标准（US）采用。信息技术和无线设备的抗扰度要求基于IEC 61000-4-x系列（静电放电、辐射抗扰度、电快速瞬变/脉冲群、浪涌、传导骚扰），通过IEC 61000-6-1（通用居住环境抗扰度）和IEC 61000-6-2（通用工业环境抗扰度）或特定产品标准（如包含音视频及IT设备抗扰度要求的IEC 62368-1）实施。符合上述IEC标准的测试证据可支持UCC型式批准申请和UNBS售后市场监督。
summary.zht: UNBS將IEC 61000系列抗擾度標準作為烏干達標準（US）採用。信息技術和無線裝置的抗擾度要求基於IEC 61000-4-x系列（靜電放電、輻射抗擾度、電快速瞬變/脈衝群、浪涌、傳導騷擾），通過IEC 61000-6-1（通用居住環境抗擾度）和IEC 61000-6-2（通用工業環境抗擾度）或特定產品標準（如包含音視頻及IT設備抗擾度要求的IEC 62368-1）實施。符合上述IEC標準的測試證據可支持UCC型式批准申請和UNBS售後市場監督。

summary.en: China immunity requirements are covered by GB/T 17626-series standards (IEC 61000-4-x equivalents) and GB/T 9254 / GB 4343.1 under the CCC or self-declaration regime. GB/T 17626 is technically harmonised with IEC 61000-4-x, so Chinese immunity test reports are structurally very close to IEC equivalents; however they are issued under GB/T references and may need IEC-cited supplementary reports or a statement of equivalence for UNBS acceptance.
summary.zh: 中国抗扰度要求由GB/T 17626系列标准（IEC 61000-4-x等效标准）以及CCC或自我声明体系下的GB/T 9254 / GB 4343.1涵盖。GB/T 17626与IEC 61000-4-x在技术上已协调一致，因此中国抗扰度测试报告在结构上与IEC等效标准非常接近；但报告引用的是GB/T编号，UNBS接受时可能需要引用IEC标准的补充报告或等效性声明。
summary.zht: 中國抗擾度要求由GB/T 17626系列標準（IEC 61000-4-x等效標準）以及CCC或自我聲明體系下的GB/T 9254 / GB 4343.1涵蓋。GB/T 17626與IEC 61000-4-x在技術上已協調一致，因此中國抗擾度測試報告在結構上與IEC等效標準非常接近；但報告引用的是GB/T編號，UNBS接受時可能需要引用IEC標準的補充報告或等效性聲明。

standards_or_laws: CCC mandatory certification for applicable in-scope products

gap.en: China GB/T 17626-series immunity test reports are technically aligned with IEC 61000-4-x but reference GB/T standard numbers. IEC-cited test reports from an ILAC/CNAS-accredited laboratory (directly referencing IEC 61000-4-x and IEC 61000-6-1/6-2 or IEC 62368-1) are needed to satisfy UNBS requirements. The technical content gap is low but the citation and accreditation format gap must be addressed.
gap.zh: 中国GB/T 17626系列抗扰度测试报告在技术上与IEC 61000-4-x标准一致，但引用的是GB/T编号。需提供引用IEC标准（直接引用IEC 61000-4-x及IEC 61000-6-1/6-2或IEC 62368-1）的ILAC/CNAS认可实验室测试报告，以满足UNBS要求。技术内容差距较小，但引用格式和认可资质格式须加以处理。
gap.zht: 中國GB/T 17626系列抗擾度測試報告在技術上與IEC 61000-4-x標準一致，但引用的是GB/T編號。需提供引用IEC標準（直接引用IEC 61000-4-x及IEC 61000-6-1/6-2或IEC 62368-1）的ILAC/CNAS認可實驗室測試報告，以滿足UNBS要求。技術內容差距較小，但引用格式和認可資質格式須加以處理。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Uganda (UNBS) adopts IEC 61000-series immunity standards. China GB/T 17626-series reports are technically close but cite GB/T numbers; IEC-cited test reports from an ILAC/CNAS-accredited laboratory are needed to support UCC type approval dossiers and UNBS market surveillance.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 乌干达（UNBS）采用IEC 61000系列抗扰度标准。中国GB/T 17626系列报告在技术上接近，但引用GB/T编号；须提供引用IEC标准的ILAC/CNAS认可实验室测试报告，以支持UCC型式批准申请和UNBS市场监督。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 烏干達（UNBS）採用IEC 61000系列抗擾度標準。中國GB/T 17626系列報告在技術上接近，但引用GB/T編號；須提供引用IEC標準的ILAC/CNAS認可實驗室測試報告，以支持UCC型式批准申請和UNBS市場監督。
